entries.statement: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
Review and approve data model designs produced by data engineers and analysts, ensuring conformance with enterprise standards and architectural principles.
Evaluate and recommend data platform technology selections, producing architecture decision records with evidence-based rationale.
Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, schema evolution policies, API versioning standards, and event schema governance.
Design, build, and maintain data ingestion pipelines from source systems to the data platform, including schema mapping, transformation logic, and error handling.
Optimize existing data pipelines for performance, cost, and reliability, documenting changes and their measured impact.
Design and maintain the analytics transformation layer, including staging models, intermediate transformations, and consumption-ready data mart models.
Define, document, and implement enterprise metric definitions in the semantic layer, ensuring consistency across BI tools and analytical consumers.
Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost, and security events, with defined escalation procedures.
Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, and privilege escalation procedures.

Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformations, automated testing, CI/CD deployment including infrastructure-as-code, environment parity between development and production, rollback procedures, and deployment processes that enable rapid iteration without production risk.

Manage data environment provisioning and configuration, ensuring development, staging, and production environments maintain parity and that pipeline promotions follow defined testing and approval workflows.

Implement and maintain data backup and disaster recovery procedures, including automated backup scheduling, recovery testing, failover execution, and validation that recovery point and recovery time objectives are achievable.
Plan and execute data migration projects between platforms, including source-to-target mapping, data validation, cutover scheduling, rollback planning, and post-migration verification.
Design and maintain data catalog and metadata management systems, including automated metadata harvesting, business glossary integration, data asset discovery, and lineage visualization.
Implement data lineage and provenance tracking across the data platform, enabling impact analysis, regulatory compliance evidence, and debugging of data quality issues to their source.
Perform database administration and routine maintenance, including patching, index optimization, storage management, performance monitoring, and end-of-life planning for database systems.
Design and implement data API and service layers that enable controlled data consumption, including endpoint design, authentication integration, rate limiting, documentation, and usage monitoring.

Execute data platform capacity planning, including workload characterization, growth forecasting, resource utilization analysis, and scaling recommendations that balance performance requirements against cost constraints.
Conduct data platform security assessments, including vulnerability scanning, access control audits, encryption verification, and remediation of identified security gaps in data infrastructure.

Manage schema evolution and versioning across data platform environments, including compatibility assessment, migration execution, consumer notification, and validation that schema changes do not break downstream systems.

Design and implement event-driven data architectures, including message broker configuration, event schema design, consumer group management, and monitoring of event processing latency and throughput.

Conduct data platform vendor evaluations and proofs of concept, including requirements definition, test scenario design, evaluation criteria development, and evidence-based recommendation documentation.

Produce and maintain data architecture documentation, including system topology diagrams, data flow documentation, technology stack descriptions, operational runbooks, and architecture decision records that capture rationale for current design choices.
